ham.subject: Monthly Account Statement – March 2026
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

Your March 2026 account statement is now available for download. Please review the transaction details and verify that all entries are correct.

You can access the statement safely through the secure link below:
<URL>

If you notice any discrepancies or have questions, feel free to contact our customer support team.

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,
Customer Service Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Account Access Suspended – Verify Immediately!
spam.body:
Hello,

We have detected multiple unauthorized login attempts in the last 24 hours. As a result, your account has been temporarily suspended to protect your funds.

To reactivate your account, you must verify your identity within the next 4 hours. Failure to do so will result in permanent closure.

Please click the link below to complete the verification:
<URL>

This is a secure and official action from our Fraud Prevention Team. Do not ignore it.

Regards,
Fraud Prevention Team
